_note: Controlled reference fixture — NOT a live AWS output. Matches the CaseOutput schema. Citations reference the fake KB chunks from tests/fakes/fake_retrieval.py.
summary: CISA #StopRansomware advisory describes an active campaign by a ransomware threat actor targeting critical infrastructure sectors. The advisory provides technical indicators, MITRE ATT&CK mappings, and recommended mitigations. Organizations are advised to apply mitigations immediately, review their detection capabilities, and validate backup and recovery procedures.
recommendations: Apply all vendor-recommended patches and mitigations referenced in the advisory immediately.
Implement or verify multi-factor authentication on all internet-facing systems.
Review and test backup and recovery procedures to confirm resilience against ransomware encryption.
Search for indicators of compromise (IoCs) provided in the advisory across endpoint and network logs.
Report any confirmed compromise to CISA using the official reporting channels.
